name: Chocolate Chip Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Cake part:
1. Generously grease a 10-inch tube pan; set aside.
2. Measure milk and butter into saucepan; heat until warm.
3. In a large bowl, mix sugar, salt, yeast, and 1 cup of flour.
4. Add the liquid to the dry ingredients. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed of an electric mixer, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Gradually add 1 cup of flour and eggs. Beat on high speed for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Stir in the remaining 1 1/2 cups of flour and chocolate chips.
7. Turn the dough into the prepared pan; sprinkle with coffee topping (recipe below).
8. Cover the pan and let the dough rise in a warm place until doubled, approximately 1 hour.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 35 to 40 minutes or until done.
10. Turn out of the pan immediately.
Coffee Topping:
1/2 cup All-purpose flour
1/2 cup Sugar
1/2 cup Butter or margarine
1/2 cup Chopped walnuts (optional)
1/3 cup Chocolate chips
1 tsp Instant coffee
1 tsp Vanilla
Combine flour, sugar, and butter. Rub together with the fingers to make coarse crumbs. Add nuts, chocolate chips, instant coffee, and vanilla.
